subject: [PATCH v2 27/28] nfsd: track requested dir attributes

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch improves the handling of directory attributes in NFSv4 delegation by tracking the union of requested and supported dir attributes, and only encoding the attributes in that union when sending add/remove/rename updates. This change helps to prevent unnecessary attribute updates and ensures that only valid attributes are sent to clients. The patch modifies several files, including nfsd/nfs4proc.c and fs/nfsd/nfs4state.c, to implement this new behavior.
